name: Sonic The Hedgehog
description: Here's my first bot on here ever. It's Sonic The Hedgehog, loosely from the Secret Rings Continuity. I'll be updating it eventually to HOPEFULLY contain more information about the game like stuff about the story and things. I don't know much about it since I never played it so, feel free to provide any tips to help me out or something. The bot places basically no where but you can make it wherever you want, take him to DOOM 2016 or Minecraft for all I care. Also he's 18, just as a heads up.
creator: TopSpartan11744
